title: High uncertainty on r in pull-impacts

posts.name: Saswati Nandan
posts.text:
Dear experts,
I am trying to run pull and impacts where I see large one sided uncertainty on r. I tried many options in CH like robustFit, robust Hese, changing r range, maxFailedSteps but nothing worked. I put my datcards here
/afs/cern.ch/user/s/snandan/public/pull_800_spin2/ and also attached the pul-impacts plot herewith
pulls_impacts__poi_r__params_r1.0_r_gghh1.0_r_qqhh1.0_kl1.0_kt1.0_CV1.0_C2V1.0__mcstats.pdf (38.0 KB)
The command which I ran usually is something like this
combine --method MultiDimFit datcard_file --verbose 1
–mass 125.0 --seed 0 --snapshotName MultiDimFit --redefineSignalPOIs r --setParameterRanges r=-10000,10000
–robustFit 1 --maxFailedSteps 10
–setParameters r=1.0 --saveNLL --cminDefaultMinimizerType Minuit2 --cminDefaultMinimizerStrategy 0 --cminDefaultMinimizerTolerance 0.1 --cminFallbackAlgo Minuit2,0:0.2 --cminFallbackAlgo Minuit2,0:0.4
–X-rtd REMOVE_CONSTANT_ZERO_POINT=1 --algo singles --saveFitResult
It would be nice if someone tells what is going wrong and how to solve it.
Thanks and Regards,
Saswati

Thanks and Regards,
Saswati

posts.name: Andrea Carlo Marini
posts.text:
It seems that the initial fit was unable to find the correct crossing.
Maybe you can set an adequate range on r and retry?
-Andrea
posts.cooked_html:
It seems that the initial fit was unable to find the correct crossing.
Maybe you can set an adequate range on r and retry?

-Andrea

posts.name: Saswati Nandan
posts.text:
Dear experts,
I tried to understand the reason in more detail. So in my case I have 6 regions, I looked at pulls and impacts for one region separately and I see same thing there also. I have attached plot herewith.
pull_HH_resolved_2b.pdf (29.6 KB)
For this I used --robustHesse 1 option and I see some error like this
Running Minos for POI
Error in <ROOT::Math::Fitter::CalculateMinosErrors>: Minos error calculation failed for all parameters
>> Found 106 floating parameters
>> The following parameters are protected in the event of negative eigenvalues: r
>> Verifying eigenvalues are all positive (iteration 0)
>> All eigenvalues are positive
>> Inverting Hessian...
>> Matrix inverted

--- MultiDimFit ---
Parameter impacts:
Parameter          :   Best-fit               r
CMS_bbwwsl_tt_norm :   -0.000  +0.000/+0.031  +0.000/+0.008

So I thought there is some problem in CMS_bbwwsl_tt_norm. So I did a scan of this parameter using the command
combine datacard -M MultiDimFit --algo grid --points 100
--setParameterRanges CMS_bbwwsl_tt_norm=-7,7 -m 125
-P CMS_bbwwsl_tt_norm
-t -1 --cminFallbackAlgo Minuit2,0:0.2 --cminFallbackAlgo Minuit2,0:0.4 --cminDefaultMinimizerStrategy=1

and the plot is attached also.
scan.pdf (14.6 KB)
I don’t see any problem in this scan or I am missing something? Same thing happened for other region also. It would be nice if someone tells what is wrong that uncertainty on r is so large.
Thanks and Regards,
Saswati

posts.name: Saswati Nandan
posts.text:
Hi Andrea,
Sorry I missed your email, just after sending my last email, I saw you email. Extremely sorry.
Thanks,
Saswati

posts.name: Saswati Nandan
posts.text:
Hi @amarini
I tried different range of r like 100,200,500,600,10000,100000 but every time the result is same and I get some error for CMS_bbwwsl_tt_norm which I mentioned in my last email. I am pasting the commands which I run here
combine workspace.root --verbose 1 --mass 125.0 --seed 0 --toys -1 --redefineSignalPOIs r --setParameterRanges r=-200,200 --robustHesse 1 --maxFailedSteps 10 --setParameters r=1.0, --saveNLL --cminDefaultMinimizerType Minuit2 --cminDefaultMinimizerStrategy 0 --cminDefaultMinimizerTolerance 0.1 --cminFallbackAlgo Minuit2,0:0.2 --cminFallbackAlgo Minuit2,0:0.4 --X-rtd REMOVE_CONSTANT_ZERO_POINT=1 --algo singles --saveFitResult

combine workspace.root --verbose 1 --mass 125.0 --seed 2 --toys -1 --redefineSignalPOIs r --setParameterRanges r=-200,200 --robustHesse 1 --maxFailedSteps 10 --setParameters r=1.0 --saveNLL --cminDefaultMinimizerType Minuit2 --cminDefaultMinimizerStrategy 0 --cminDefaultMinimizerTolerance 0.1 --cminFallbackAlgo Minuit2,0:0.2 --cminFallbackAlgo Minuit2,0:0.4
--X-rtd REMOVE_CONSTANT_ZERO_POINT=1 --algo impact --parameters BR_htt --floatOtherPOIs 1 --saveInactivePOI 1

The last command is run for all systematics, only the -parameters and --seed are changed. Can you please tell whether these commands are okay and what else I should check?
